debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝¹ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝ : Fact (p > 2)
n : ℕ
hn : 2 ^ (n + 1) < p
i : ℕ
env : Environment (F p)
input : Var fieldPair (F p)
x y : F p
h_input : Expression.eval env input.1 = x ∧ Expression.eval env input.2 = y
assumptions : ZMod.val x < 2 ^ n ∧ ZMod.val y < 2 ^ n
⊢ ZMod.val (y + 1) < 2 ^ n

failed_attempts:
simp [ZMod.val_sub, ZMod.val_add_of_lt, ZMod.val_pow, ZMod.val_ofNat_of_lt, Fact.out, h2n] at *
    omega

have hy : y.val + 1 < p := by
        have : 2^n < p := lt_of_le_of_lt (by gcongr; linarith) hn
        linarith [assumptions.2]
      rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt hy, ZMod.val_one]
      omega⟩

end LessEqThan

simp [h_input.1, h_input.2, hy_val, heq] at *
    refine ⟨?_, by simp [h_env, hy_val, heq, circuit_norm]⟩
    rw [← sub_eq_add_neg, ZMod.val_sub, ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
    <;> simp [heq, hy_val] <;> linarith [hx, hy, hn]

end LessEqThan

rcases h_assumptions with ⟨hx, hy⟩
    have h1 : ZMod.val (2^n : F p) = 2^n := by
      rw [ZMod.val_pow, ZMod.val_ofNat]; simp [Fact.out]; omega
    have h2 : ZMod.val (y + 1) = ZMod.val y + 1 := by
      rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]; simp [ZMod.val_one]; omega
    have h3 : ZMod.val (x + 2^n) = ZMod.val x + 2^n := by
      rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]; simp [h1]; omega
    rw [ZMod.val_sub, h2, h3] <;> omega

end LessEqThan

rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]; simp [ZMod.val_pow, ZMod.val_ofNat, Fact.out]; linarith
    have h2 : (y + 1).val = y.val + 1 := by
      rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]; simp [ZMod.val_one]; linarith
    refine ⟨?_, h_env.2⟩
    rw [ZMod.val_sub, h1, h2]
    · simp [ZMod.val_pow, ZMod.val_ofNat, Fact.out]; omega
    · rw [h1, h2]; omega

end LessEqThan

simp only [h_out, h_bits_spec, fieldToBits, toBits]
    have h_p : 2^n < p := lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by linarith) (Nat.le_succ n)) hn
    have : (x + (2 : F p)^n - (y + 1)).val = x.val + 2^n - y.val - 1 := by
      rw [← sub_eq_add_neg, ← sub_eq_add_neg, ZMod.val_sub, ZMod.val_add, ZMod.val_one]
      simp [h_p, ZMod.val_pow, ZMod.val_ofNat, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt, *]
      · rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]; linarith; linarith
      · rw [ZMod.val_add, ZMod.val_one, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]; linarith; linarith
    rw [this]; split_ifs <;> simp [Nat.testBit, Nat.shiftRight_eq_div_pow]
    · apply Nat.div_eq_of_lt; linarith
    · have : (x.val + 2^n - y.val - 1) / 2^n = 1 := by
        apply le_antisymm <;> (rw [Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le, Nat.div_le_iff_mul_le] <;> linarith [pow_pos (by decide) n])
      simp [this]

end LessEqThan

have heq: ZMod.val ((2 : F p) ^ n) = 2^n := by
      rw [ZMod.val_pow, ZMod.val_ofNat_of_lt (Fact.out : Nat.Prime p).pos, ZMod.val_ofNat_of_lt Fact.out]
      exact this
    have hy_val : (y + 1).val = y.val + 1 := by
      rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]; rfl; simp [ZMod.val_one]; linarith
    by_cases h_lt : y.val + 1 < 2^n
    · specialize h_env (by omega); simp_all [Nat.lt_add_one_iff]
    · have : y.val + 1 = 2^n := by omega
      simp [this, Nat.lt_add_one_iff, assumptions.left]
      have h_bit : (ZMod.val (x + 2^n - (y + 1))).testBit n = false := by
        rw [ZMod.val_sub, ZMod.val_add_of_lt, heq, hy_val, this]
        · exact Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt assumptions.left
        · repeat (first | omega | rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt, heq]; omega)
      simp [h_env.right, h_bit]
